scripts.db:migrate: cross-env DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:postgres@localhost:5433/pm_quant?schema=public corepack pnpm --filter @pm-quant/api run prisma:migrate && cross-env DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:postgres@localhost:5433/pm_quant?schema=public corepack pnpm --filter @pm-quant/api run prisma:generate
scripts.api:dev: cross-env DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:postgres@localhost:5433/pm_quant?schema=public REDIS_URL=redis://localhost:6380 DEVICE_JWT_SECRET=dev-device-jwt-secret corepack pnpm --filter @pm-quant/api dev
scripts.signer-gateway:dev: cross-env DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:postgres@localhost:5433/pm_quant?schema=public DEVICE_JWT_SECRET=dev-device-jwt-secret SIGNER_GATEWAY_PORT=4100 corepack pnpm --filter @pm-quant/signer-gateway dev
